subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-08 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: There exists between us a spiritual bond and closenes that will never be followed by remoteness and separation. Praised be God, the light of guidance is shining brightly
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما قرب روحانی داریم قرب و ارتباطی که آن را بُعد و انفصالی
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
